allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\);const model=d?.model?.display_name||'?';const used=d?.context_window?.used_percentage;const cwd=d?.workspace?.current_dir||d?.cwd||'';let branch='';try{branch=require\('child_process'\).execSync\('git -C '+JSON.stringify\(cwd\)+' symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null',{stdio:['pipe','pipe','pipe']}\).toString\(\).trim\(\);}catch\(e\){}const home=process.env.HOME||process.env.USERPROFILE||'';const short=cwd.replace\(home,'~'\);let out=model;if\(used!=null\){const p=Math.round\(used\);const f='#'.repeat\(Math.round\(p/10\)\).padEnd\(10,'-'\);out+=\\` | ctx:[\\${f}] \\${p}%\\`;}if\(branch\)out+=\\` | \\${branch}\\`;if\(short\)out+=\\` | \\${short}\\`;process.stdout.write\(out\);")

Bash(node -e "let raw='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>raw+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const d=JSON.parse\(raw\);const model=d?.model?.display_name||'?';const used=d?.context_window?.used_percentage;const cwd=d?.workspace?.current_dir||d?.cwd||'';let branch='';try{branch=require\('child_process'\).execSync\('git -C '+JSON.stringify\(cwd\)+' symbolic-ref --short HEAD',{stdio:['pipe','pipe','pipe'],timeout:2000}\).toString\(\).trim\(\);}catch\(e\){}const home=\(process.env.USERPROFILE||process.env.HOME||''\).replace\(/\\\\\\\\/g,'/'\);const short=cwd.replace\(home,'~'\);let out=model;if\(used!=null\){const p=Math.round\(used\);const f='#'.repeat\(Math.round\(p/10\)\).padEnd\(10,'-'\);out+=\\` | ctx:[\\${f}] \\${p}%\\`;}if\(branch\)out+=\\` | \\${branch}\\`;if\(short\)out+=\\` | \\${short}\\`;process.stdout.write\(out\);}catch\(e\){process.stdout.write\('status error'\);}}\);")
